name: SAG Mill Vibration Diagnosis
description: Diagnose excessive vibration on SAG Mill drive end — should match bearing-related FMs

symptoms.description: Excessive vibration from drive end bearing

assertions: Candidates include bearing wear or lubrication-related FMs
First recommended test is SENSORY (zero cost)
All candidate FM codes are valid 72-combo entries

name: Pump Overheating Diagnosis
description: Diagnose overheating pump — should match thermal or lubrication FMs
assertions: Candidates include OVERHEATS/MELTS + Lack of lubrication (FM-51) or Contamination (FM-49)
Corrective action includes lubrication check or replacement

name: Confidence Update After Test
description: Verify confidence increases when test confirms suspected FM
assertions: Confidence for matching candidate increases by ~0.15

name: Escalation After Low Confidence
description: After 3 tests with no clear match, system should recommend escalation
assertions: Session status changes to ESCALATED or escalation is recommended

name: Decision Tree Navigation
description: Use SAG Mill vibration decision tree for structured diagnosis
assertions: Decision tree loads for SAG Mill vibration category
